message:
Enable auto-embedding for GROUP BY NEAR on string columns

- Add support for on-the-fly embedding of string columns in executeGroupByNearQuery
- Expose MiniLM helper functions (isLoaded, copyTextToBuffer, copyOutputToBuffer) to other Zig modules
- Fix getVectorData to auto-embed strings when MiniLM is available
- Resolve type mismatch in copyOutputToBuffer by accepting slice
